Component.description: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular component and supplies configuration metadata including template, styles, selector, and change detection strategy.

NgModule.description: Decorator that marks a class as an NgModule with declarations, imports, providers, exports, and bootstrap arrays.

Injectable.description: Decorator that marks a class as available to be provided and injected as a dependency.

Directive.description: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular directive with a selector and optional standalone flag.

Pipe.signature: @Pipe(metadata: { name: string; standalone?: boolean; pure?: boolean })
Pipe.description: Decorator that marks a class as a pipe and supplies a name for template use.

Input.description: Decorator that marks a class field as an input property bound to a DOM property in the template.

Output.description: Decorator that marks a class field as an output property that emits events to the parent component.

ViewChild.signature: @ViewChild(selector: Type<any> | string, opts?: { read?: any; static?: boolean })
ViewChild.description: Configures a view query that looks for the first element or directive matching the selector in the view DOM.

ViewChildren.description: Configures a view query that looks for all elements or directives matching the selector.

ContentChild.signature: @ContentChild(selector: Type<any> | string, opts?: { read?: any; static?: boolean })
ContentChild.description: Configures a content query for the first element or directive matching the selector in the content DOM.

ContentChildren.signature: @ContentChildren(selector: Type<any> | string, opts?: { read?: any; descendants?: boolean })
ContentChildren.description: Configures a content query for all elements or directives matching the selector in the content DOM.

HostBinding.description: Marks a DOM property or element attribute as a host-binding property.

HostListener.description: Declares a host event listener. Angular invokes the decorated method when the host element emits the event.

Inject.description: Specifies a custom provider of a dependency via an injection token.

Optional.description: Marks a dependency as optional. The injector provides null if the dependency is not found.

Self.description: Instructs the DI framework to resolve a dependency only from the local injector.

SkipSelf.description: Instructs the DI framework to resolve a dependency starting from the parent injector.

Host.description: Instructs the DI framework to resolve a dependency by checking the host element's injector.

OnInit.description: Lifecycle hook called once after the first ngOnChanges. Used for component initialization logic.

OnDestroy.description: Lifecycle hook called once when the directive/component is destroyed. Used for cleanup.

OnChanges.description: Lifecycle hook called when any data-bound input property changes.

AfterViewInit.description: Lifecycle hook called after the component's view and child views have been fully initialized.

AfterContentInit.description: Lifecycle hook called after content has been projected into the component.

DoCheck.description: Lifecycle hook called during every change detection run. Detect changes Angular cannot.

AfterViewChecked.description: Lifecycle hook called after every check of the component's view.

AfterContentChecked.description: Lifecycle hook called after every check of projected content.

signal.signature: function signal<T>(initialValue: T, options?: CreateSignalOptions<T>): WritableSignal<T>
signal.description: Creates a writable signal with an initial value. Signals are reactive primitives that notify consumers when they change.

computed.signature: function computed<T>(computation: () => T, options?: CreateComputedOptions<T>): Signal<T>
computed.description: Creates a memoized signal derived from other signals. Re-evaluates only when dependencies change.

effect.signature: function effect(effectFn: () => void, options?: CreateEffectOptions): EffectRef
effect.description: Creates an effect that runs a side-effectful function whenever signals it reads change.

input.signature: function input<T>(initialValue?: T, opts?: InputOptions<T>): InputSignal<T>
input.description: Signal-based alternative to @Input. Declares a signal input property on a directive or component.

output.description: Signal-based alternative to @Output. Declares an output that emits values to parent components.

model.signature: function model<T>(initialValue?: T, opts?: ModelOptions): ModelSignal<T>
model.description: Creates a model signal for two-way data binding. Combines input and output in a single API.

viewChild.signature: function viewChild<T>(locator: string | Type<T>, opts?: { read?: any }): Signal<T | undefined>
viewChild.description: Signal-based view child query. Returns a signal that updates when the queried element changes.

viewChildren.signature: function viewChildren<T>(locator: string | Type<T>, opts?: { read?: any }): Signal<ReadonlyArray<T>>
viewChildren.description: Signal-based view children query. Returns a signal with a list of all matching elements.

contentChild.signature: function contentChild<T>(locator: string | Type<T>, opts?: { read?: any }): Signal<T | undefined>
contentChild.description: Signal-based content child query. Queries projected content for a single matching element.

contentChildren.signature: function contentChildren<T>(locator: string | Type<T>, opts?: { read?: any }): Signal<ReadonlyArray<T>>
contentChildren.description: Signal-based content children query. Queries all matching projected content elements.

linkedSignal.description: Creates a writable signal that resets to a computed value whenever a source signal changes.

resource.signature: function resource<T, R>(options: ResourceOptions<T, R>): ResourceRef<R>
resource.description: Creates a resource that loads data asynchronously based on a reactive request signal.

toSignal.signature: function toSignal<T>(source: Observable<T>, options?: ToSignalOptions<T>): Signal<T>
toSignal.description: Converts an Observable to a signal. Emitted values update the signal.

toObservable.description: Converts a signal to an Observable that emits whenever the signal value changes.

EventEmitter.description: Use in directives and components to emit custom events synchronously or asynchronously.

ChangeDetectionStrategy.description: Defines the strategy the change detector uses. OnPush checks only when inputs change or events fire.

ViewEncapsulation.description: Defines the template and style encapsulation options for a component.

ChangeDetectorRef.description: Base class providing change detection functionality: detectChanges, markForCheck, detach, reattach.

ElementRef.description: Wrapper around a native element inside a View. Use with caution as direct DOM access bypasses Angular's templating.

TemplateRef.description: Represents an embedded template that can be used to instantiate embedded views.

ViewContainerRef.description: Represents a container where one or more views can be attached. Provides methods to create, insert, and remove views.

Renderer2.description: Abstraction for DOM rendering. Provides a platform-agnostic API for DOM manipulation.

NgZone.description: Injectable service for executing work inside or outside of the Angular zone for change detection optimization.

Injector.description: Concrete injectors implement this interface. Retrieves instances of dependencies by token.

DestroyRef.description: Allows registering cleanup callbacks invoked when the associated context is destroyed.

inject.signature: function inject<T>(token: ProviderToken<T>, options?: InjectOptions): T
inject.description: Injects a token from the currently active injector. Must be used in an injection context.

FormControl.description: Tracks the value and validation status of an individual form control.

FormGroup.description: Tracks the value and validity state of a group of FormControl instances.

FormBuilder.description: Creates AbstractControl instances from configuration. Reduces boilerplate for creating reactive forms.

FormArray.description: Tracks the value and validity of an array of form control instances.

Validators.description: Provides built-in validators: required, minLength, maxLength, pattern, email, min, max, etc.

ReactiveFormsModule.description: Provides directives and services for reactive forms: formControl, formGroup, formArrayName.

FormsModule.description: Provides NgModel and related directives for template-driven forms.

Router.description: Provides navigation among views and URL manipulation capabilities.

ActivatedRoute.description: Provides access to information about a route associated with a component loaded in an outlet.

RouterModule.description: Adds router directives and providers. Use forRoot for root and forChild for feature modules.

RouterOutlet.description: Placeholder directive that Angular dynamically fills based on the current router state.

RouterLink.description: Directive that turns user clicks into router navigations.

RouterLinkActive.description: Tracks whether the linked route is currently active and sets CSS classes accordingly.

provideRouter.description: Sets up providers for the router in standalone application configuration.

withComponentInputBinding.description: Enables binding route parameters directly to component inputs.

HttpClient.description: Injectable service for performing HTTP requests. Supports typed responses and interceptors.

HttpHeaders.description: Immutable set of HTTP headers for configuring HTTP requests.

HttpParams.description: Immutable HTTP request/response body representing serialized URL parameters.

HttpInterceptor.signature: interface HttpInterceptor { intercept(req: HttpRequest<any>, next: HttpHandler): Observable<HttpEvent<any>> }
HttpInterceptor.description: Interface for class-based interceptors that modify outgoing requests and incoming responses.

provideHttpClient.description: Sets up providers for HttpClient in standalone application configuration.

withInterceptors.description: Configures functional HTTP interceptors for the application.

withFetch.description: Configures HttpClient to use the Fetch API instead of XMLHttpRequest.

NgIf.description: Structural directive that conditionally includes a template based on an expression value.

NgFor.description: Structural directive that renders a template for each item in a collection.

NgSwitch.description: Structural directive that switches templates based on a match expression.

NgClass.description: Adds and removes CSS classes on an HTML element based on an expression.

NgStyle.description: Updates inline styles of the host HTML element based on an expression.

AsyncPipe.description: Subscribes to an Observable or Promise and returns the latest emitted value. Unsubscribes on destroy.

DatePipe.description: Formats a date value according to locale rules and a format string.

CurrencyPipe.description: Transforms a number to a currency string according to locale rules.

DecimalPipe.description: Transforms a number to a decimal string according to locale rules.

PercentPipe.description: Transforms a number to a percentage string according to locale rules.

JsonPipe.description: Converts a value into its JSON-format representation. Useful for debugging.

SlicePipe.description: Creates a new Array or String containing a subset of elements.

UpperCasePipe.description: Transforms text to all upper case.

LowerCasePipe.description: Transforms text to all lower case.

TitleCasePipe.description: Transforms text to title case (first letter of each word capitalized).

KeyValuePipe.description: Transforms Object or Map into an array of key-value pairs for iteration.

bootstrapApplication.signature: function bootstrapApplication(rootComponent: Type<unknown>, options?: ApplicationConfig): Promise<ApplicationRef>
bootstrapApplication.description: Bootstraps an instance of a standalone Angular component as the root of the application.

ApplicationConfig.description: Configuration options available during the application bootstrap operation.

importProvidersFrom.description: Collects providers from NgModules for use in standalone application configuration.

provideZoneChangeDetection.description: Provides NgZone-based change detection for the application.

takeUntilDestroyed.description: RxJS operator that completes an Observable when the associated component or service is destroyed.
